I2C, PWM, power management, and UART drivers and definitions for STM32F7.


## Files
- **[i2c_hal.c](i2c_hal.c.md)**: I2C hardware abstraction layer for STM32F7, including initialization, transfer management, and IRQ handling.
- **[i2c_hal_definitions.h](i2c_hal_definitions.h.md)**: Defines the I2CBusHal structure and IRQ handlers for I2C event and error interrupts.
- **[i2c_timingr.c](i2c_timingr.c.md)**: Calculates I2C timing register values for STM32F7 based on clock frequency and bus mode.
- **[i2c_timingr.h](i2c_timingr.h.md)**: Defines I2C bus modes and a function to calculate I2C timing register values.
- **[pwm.c](pwm.c.md)**: PWM driver implementation for STM32F7, including initialization, duty cycle setting, and enabling.
- **[pwr.c](pwr.c.md)**: Power management functions for STM32F7, including wakeup, flash power down, and backup domain access.
- **[uart.c](uart.c.md)**: UART driver implementation for STM32F7, including initialization, configuration, read/write operations, interrupts, and DMA support.
- **[uart_definitions.h](uart_definitions.h.md)**: Defines structures and functions for UART device state and configuration on STM32F7.
